portfolio.title: Job Portal Website
portfolio.description: Developed a dynamic job portal website using React, Redux, and Firebase, achieving a substantial increase in user engagement and a significant reduction in communication-related errors. Secure Firebase-based user authentication. Versatile job filtering system (location, job title, parttime/full-time/remote). Blog feature for community engagement. Comprehensive review system for transparency Feedback and contact section for communication.

portfolio.title: E-Commerce Website
portfolio.description: Developed a dynamic e-commerce website using React, Redux, and Firebase, resulting in a substantial increase in user engagement and a notable reduction in communication-related errors.

portfolio.title: Sorting Visualizer
portfolio.description: Created a Sorting Visualizer project using React, CSS, HTML and Firebase, enabling real-time visualization of various sorting algorithms.Visualizes sorting algorithms like merge, quick, heap, and more using vertical bars with distinct colors. Differentiates changing bars during sorting. Highlights the current bar in the sorting process.
